title: Arithmetic of Cardinal Numbers
description: A flowchart illustrating the fundamental operations and properties of cardinal number arithmetic, showing how cardinalities combine under union, product, and exponentiation.
elements: Resulting Cardinality (e.g., n + m, ℵ₀ + ℵ₀)
relationships: Finite sets combine to form other finite sets
Union of two countably infinite sets is countably infinite (ℵ₀)
Cartesian product of two countably infinite sets is countably infinite (ℵ₀)
Power set of any set has cardinality 2^|A|
Exponentiation |B|^|A| defines mappings from A to B
Specific rules govern results of operations between different cardinalities (finite, ℵ₀, c)
